name: Get outputs
description: List AirPlay speakers available in OwnTone. Apple TVs requiring pairing and the virtual Computer output are excluded. Use this to see available speaker names before calling owntone_set_outputs.

name: GET /api/outputs
Set outputs
description: Select which rooms/speakers should receive audio. Call this first when the user wants music in specific rooms. OwnTone then distributes audio to the selected speakers via AirPlay 2. Workflow: 1) owntone_set_outputs to pick rooms, 2) owntone_play_spotify to start music.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["names"],"properties":{"names":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"Speaker names to activate (case-insensitive) — use owntone_get_outputs for available names. All others will be deactivated."},"volume":{"type":"integer","description":"Volume 0-100 to set on activated outputs (optional)","minimum":0,"maximum":100}}}

name: PUT /api/outputs
Play Spotify
description: Play a Spotify item on the currently active OwnTone outputs. Call owntone_set_outputs first to select rooms. Accepts any Spotify URI: track, playlist, album or artist.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["uri"],"properties":{"uri":{"type":"string","description":"Spotify URI to play — e.g. spotify:playlist:37i9dQZF1DX... or spotify:track:4iV5W9uY..."},"shuffle":{"type":"boolean","description":"Enable shuffle mode before playing"}}}

name: POST /api/queue/items/add
Player control
description: Control OwnTone playback and get player status. Use action="status" (or omit) to get current state. Actions: play, pause, stop, next, previous, status. Optionally set master volume 0-100 alongside any action.
inputSchema: {"type":"object","properties":{"action":{"type":"string","enum":["play","pause","stop","next","previous","status"],"description":"Playback action — omit or use status to get player state"},"volume":{"type":"integer","minimum":0,"maximum":100,"description":"Master volume 0-100 (can be combined with action)"}}}

name: Player control
